events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Dialogue, 455 Rue Sainte-Hélène Suite 200, Montréal, QC
events.raw_text:
Wed, Mar 22, 2023, 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM EDT

Talk #1: Turn your tests into action points with dbt & elementary - Stéphane Burwash (Potloc)
Talk #2: Iterative testing with dbt & data-diff - Will Sweet (Datafold)
Talk #3: Enhancing Your Testing Strategy - Hassan Al-Rabea (Montreal Analytics)

talks.description: How Potloc's data team turned dbt tests into action items and measurable results using elementary-data, including mistakes made along the way.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Does having a bunch of tests guarantee good data quality? It doesn't (trust us, we know from experience). Join us as we explore how our data team at Potloc turned tests into action items and measurable results using the power of elementary-data.
talks.title: Turn your tests into action points with dbt & elementary

talks.description: How open-source data-diff automates dbt model testing to check for unintended effects of code changes, speeding up development.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: When building dbt models, manual testing is still the most common way to check whether a change to your code had any unintended effects on the data.
talks.title: Iterative testing with dbt & data-diff

talks.description: The difference between verification and validation testing, and three types of verification testing: efficacy, style, and performance.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Join us as we zoom into the world of testing and uncover the vital role it plays in developing a data stack. Discover the difference between verification and validation testing.
talks.title: Enhancing Your Testing Strategy

6:00 Hiring & Onboarding Best Practices - Jacob Frackson (Montreal Analytics)
6:30 Finding, training and upskilling Analytics Engineers panel - Cyril Marques, Matthieu Di Mercurio, Jean-Nicholas Hould, Sarah Corboliou

talks.description: Best practices and tips for hiring and training new analytics engineers, given how hard hiring has become.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Hiring is harder than ever and we feel your pain! Jacob shares Montreal Analytics best practices and tips for hiring and training new Analytics Engineers.
talks.title: Hiring & Onboarding Best Practices
